title: parosela chrysorrhiza
intro: Parosela chrysorrhiza, also known as the Yellow Parosela, is a plant species that belongs to the family Rubiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, as well as its ability to lower blood sugar levels and improve digestion. The health benefits associated with Parosela chrysorrhiza include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system, making it a valuable herb in the treatment of various diseases. Parosela chrysorrhiza can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and its dried leaves can also be used to make capsules or tinctures for convenient consumption.
